ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Aug-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder, via Zoom, for and with Jenifer Jackson, Personal Representative.

Mr. Feder offers advocacy for the request to award extraordinary fees specifically due to the complex nature of this case and of the work involved accordingly. Mr. Feder notes that awarding those fees is at the discretion of the court and summarizes the amount of work that his client has done as the Personal Representative and would like to see her be properly compensated. The court and Mr. Feder discuss the request for anticipated additional compensation and top create a closing reserve. Mr. Feder reports that there are pending tax filings for this year and that the taxes that have been paid are estimated which may include the estate receiving a refund. The court offers its position regarding attorneys not being involved with tax matters.

After additional discussion, the matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Continued To Apr-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder, via Zoom, for Jenifer Jackson, Administrator.

The court points to the report of administrator recently filed and queries counsel as to the status of the case. Mr. Feder advises that the report was the only option he had but that his client has a petition and will file it as soon as it is signed and returned to him. The court reminds counsel that the court is expecting either a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status filed by the next calling of this matter.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
